items.title: Azure MCP Server
items.summary: Microsoft's Azure MCP surface is still in public preview, but the official server is broad enough to matter for enterprise agent workflows.
items.reason: Broad Azure coverage, official backing, and a credible enterprise story.

items.title: Hugging Face MCP Server
items.summary: Hugging Face now has an official MCP story for the Hub, which could become one of the easier ways to bring model, dataset, and Space context into agentic workflows.
items.reason: Strong overlap with model discovery, repo knowledge, and public AI artifacts.

items.title: Make MCP Toolboxes
items.summary: Make is pushing MCP deeper into its automation story via dedicated toolboxes that expose curated scenario sets to assistants.
items.reason: Interesting bridge between low-code automation and agent-native tool surfaces.

items.title: GitHub skills ecosystem
items.summary: GitHub CLI's new skills commandset hints at a broader portable-agent workflow ecosystem worth tracking alongside MCP.
items.reason: Portable instructions and agent tooling are becoming a real product layer.
